name: cimapi-skills
description: 51WORLD CIM API (@wdp-api/cim-api) skills — SDK initialization, internet map (key config, POI search/get/reset, navigation paths), spatial analysis (openness, contour, sunlight, skyline, dig-terrain, intervisible, height-limit), and hospital scene capabilities (elevator, room box, attached device). Install once, use from Cursor and every other compatible agent harness.
